name: context-os
description: Token optimization layer for Claude Code. Adds static-analysis RAG via UserPromptSubmit hook (no embeddings, no server) — Claude's first turn starts with file:line candidates from a pre-built repo graph. Ten slash commands (four query the graph), six zero-dep Python hooks (auto_context, prewarm, dedup, loop, file-size, session-profile), noise filtering, prompt caching, response shaping. 27 techniques, one installer.
